zh.lifeSummary: 當Matilda de Senlis於1090年出生時，她的父親Simon I de Senlis 1st Earl of Huntingdon-Northampton45歲，母親Matilda of Huntingdon16歲。她於大約1119年與Robert de Clare結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1163年在英國英格蘭享年74歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Senlis
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Sales
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Efren, Alberto, Francisco, Manuel, Camilo, Carlos, Fernando, Juan, Juanita, Mario, Ofelia.

English: variant of Sale with plural or post-medieval excrescent -s. The Middle English plural form was probably often in variation with the singular form. The surname is uncommon in southwestern England but may derive there from Zeals (Wiltshire), and also from the plural form of Old English sealh ‘willow’; see Seal .
Catalan, Spanish, and French (Occitan): habitational name from any of the places called Sales, like Sales de Llierca (Catalonia), from the plural of   Sala   1. Compare   De Sales  .

nameMeanings.name: Matilda
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

variants.name: Mathilda
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Matilda de Senlis was born in 1090, her father, Simon I de Senlis 1st Earl of Huntingdon-Northampton, was 45 and her mother, Matilda of Huntingdon, was 16. She married Robert de Clare about 1119. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. She died about 1163, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 74.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Matilda de Senlis est née en 1090, son père, Simon I de Senlis 1st Earl of Huntingdon-Northampton, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Matilda of Huntingdon, avait 16 ans. Elle a épousé Robert de Clare environ 1119. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1163, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 74 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Matilda de Senlisが1090年に生まれた時，父Simon I de Senlis 1st Earl of Huntingdon-Northamptonは45歳，母Matilda of Huntingdonは16歳であった。約1119年にRobert de Clareと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1163年にイギリスイギリスで74歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Matilda de Senlis(이)가 1090년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Simon I de Senlis 1st Earl of Huntingdon-Northampton(은)는 45세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Matilda of Huntingdon(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 대략 1119년 Robert de Clare(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1163년 영국 잉글랜드에서 74세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Matilda de Senlis родилась в 1090 г., её отцу по имени Simon I de Senlis 1st Earl of Huntingdon-Northampton было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Matilda of Huntingdon, 16. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert de Clare около 1119 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Она умерла около 1163 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 74 лет.
